package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_trimright_space_trimspace: `bytes.TrimRight(..., whitespace)` instead of `bytes.TrimSpace(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario469Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Equal(bytes.TrimRight(haystack, " \t\n"), needle)
}
